SEARCH
Package Business

Class ProductManager

java.lang.Object
Business.ProductManager
public class ProductManager extends Object
The `ProductManager` class manages operations related to products, including adding, correcting, and retrieving product information.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ProductManager()
    Constructs a `ProductManager` and initializes the associated `ProductJsonDAO` or `ProductApiDAO` based on availability and operability.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addProduct(ArrayList<String> productAttributes, String category)
    Adds a new product with the specified attributes to the product list.
    void
    addReviewToProduct(String productSelected, String rating, String review)
    Adds a review with a rating to a specific product.
    String
    correctProductBrand(String attributePossible)
    Corrects the product brand format.
    boolean
    correctProductName(String namePossible)
    Checks if the provided product name is correct.
    boolean

    Checks if the provided product price is correct.
    boolean
    correctRating(String rating)
    Checks if the provided rating string is correct.
    int

    Counts the number of asterisks in a rating.
    void
    eraseProduct(String productName)
    Removes a product from the list by its name.
    float
    getAverageReview(String productSelected)
    Calculates and retrieves the average review rating for a specific product.
    String
    getBrandForProduct(String productName)
    Retrieves the brand associated with a specific product.

    Retrieves the type of the current data access object (DAO) used for product management.

    Retrieves the brands of all products.

    Retrieves the discounts for all products.

    Retrieves the maximum prices of all products.

    Retrieves the names of all products.

    Retrieves the reviews for a specific product.

    Retrieves a list of product brands with similarities to the provided query.
    ArrayList<String>

    Retrieves a list of product names with similarities to the provided query.
    int

    Obtains the numerical part of a review sentence.

    Checks if there are products stored in the data source.
    boolean

    Updates information from products, transferring data between JSON and API sources.
    boolean

    Checks if the `ProductDAO` is operational.

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductManager

      public ProductManager() throws JsonException
      Constructs a `ProductManager` and initializes the associated `ProductJsonDAO` or `ProductApiDAO` based on availability and operability.
      Throws:
      JsonException - Throws it to notify there was an error with the JSON.

  • Method Details

    • workingProductDAO

      public boolean workingProductDAO() throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Checks if the `ProductDAO` is operational.
      Returns:
      True if the `ProductDAO` is operational, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.

    • addProduct

      public void addProduct(ArrayList<String> productAttributes, String category) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Adds a new product with the specified attributes to the product list.
      Parameters:
      productAttributes - The attributes of the product.
      category - The category of the product.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.

    • addReviewToProduct

      public void addReviewToProduct(String productSelected, String rating, String review) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Adds a review with a rating to a specific product.
      Parameters:
      productSelected - The name of the product to add a review to.
      rating - The rating for the review.
      review - The review content.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.

    • correctProductName

      public boolean correctProductName(String namePossible) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Checks if the provided product name is correct.
      Parameters:
      namePossible - The possible product name to check.
      Returns:
      True if the name is correct, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.

    • correctProductBrand

      public String correctProductBrand(String attributePossible)
      Corrects the product brand format.
      Parameters:
      attributePossible - The possible product brand to correct.
      Returns:
      The corrected product brand.

    • correctProductPriceMax

      public boolean correctProductPriceMax(String attributePossible)
      Checks if the provided product price is correct.
      Parameters:
      attributePossible - The possible product price to check.
      Returns:
      True if the price is correct, false otherwise.

    • getProductNames

      public ArrayList<String> getProductNames() throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Retrieves the names of all products.
      Returns:
      The list of product names.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.

    • getProductBrand

      public ArrayList<String> getProductBrand() throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Retrieves the brands of all products.
      Returns:
      The list of product brands.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.

    • eraseProduct

      public void eraseProduct(String productName) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Removes a product from the list by its name.
      Parameters:
      productName - The name of the product to remove.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.

    • getProductMaxPrices

      public ArrayList<Float> getProductMaxPrices() throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Retrieves the maximum prices of all products.
      Returns:
      The list of maximum prices for all products.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.

    • getBrandForProduct

      public String getBrandForProduct(String productName) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Retrieves the brand associated with a specific product.
      Parameters:
      productName - The name of the product.
      Returns:
      The brand of the specified product.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.

    • getProductsNamesBySimilarities

      public ArrayList<String> getProductsNamesBySimilarities(String selectedQuery) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Retrieves a list of product names with similarities to the provided query.
      Parameters:
      selectedQuery - The query string to match against product names and brands.
      Returns:
      The list of product names with similarities to the query.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.

    • getProductsBrandsBySimilarities

      public ArrayList<String> getProductsBrandsBySimilarities(String selectedQuery) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Retrieves a list of product brands with similarities to the provided query.
      Parameters:
      selectedQuery - The query string to match against product names and brands.
      Returns:
      The list of product brands with similarities to the query.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.

    • getProductReviews

      public ArrayList<String> getProductReviews(String productSelected) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.status.IncorrectRequestException
      Retrieves the reviews for a specific product.
      Parameters:
      productSelected - The name of the product to retrieve reviews for.
      Returns:
      The list of reviews for the specified product.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.status.IncorrectRequestException - If an incorrect request exception occurs.

    • getAverageReview

      public float getAverageReview(String productSelected) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Calculates and retrieves the average review rating for a specific product.
      Parameters:
      productSelected - The name of the product to calculate the average review for.
      Returns:
      The average review rating for the specified product.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.

    • obtainNumberOfTheSentence

      public int obtainNumberOfTheSentence(String review)
      Obtains the numerical part of a review sentence.
      Parameters:
      review - The review sentence to extract the numerical part from.
      Returns:
      The numerical part of the review sentence.

    • getProductDiscounts

      public ArrayList<Float> getProductDiscounts() throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Retrieves the discounts for all products.
      Returns:
      The list of discounts for all products.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.

    • countAsterisks

      public int countAsterisks(String rating)
      Counts the number of asterisks in a rating.
      Parameters:
      rating - The rating string containing asterisks.
      Returns:
      The number of asterisks in the rating.

    • correctRating

      public boolean correctRating(String rating)
      Checks if the provided rating string is correct.
      Parameters:
      rating - The rating string to check.
      Returns:
      True if the rating is correct, false otherwise.

    • thereAreProducts

      public boolean thereAreProducts() throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Checks if there are products stored in the data source.
      Returns:
      True if there are products, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.

    • updateInfoFromProducts

      public boolean updateInfoFromProducts() throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException, JsonException
      Updates information from products, transferring data between JSON and API sources.
      Returns:
      True if the update is successful, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If an API-related exception occurs.
      JsonException - If a JSON-related exception occurs.

    • getCurrentDAOType

      public String getCurrentDAOType()
      Retrieves the type of the current data access object (DAO) used for product management.
      Returns:
      The type of the current DAO, either "API", "JSON", or "Unknown" if not recognized.
